validation_hook.detail: The generic dense-rank runtime now owns the validation hook contract even though the promoted PGOLF consumer still stops after one measured train step.

checkpoint_hook.detail: The generic dense-rank runtime now owns the checkpoint hook contract even though the promoted PGOLF consumer does not yet emit a dense distributed checkpoint shard set.

claim_boundary: This reference contract promotes the CUDA dense-rank runtime substrate above Parameter Golf. It does not claim mixed-backend dense training, distributed checkpoint closure, or post-train validation closure by itself.
